code: export class WheelStateParser{constructor(){this._state='IDLE';this._landedIndex=-1;this._landedFace='';this._win=0;this._betAmount=0;this._betFace='';this._faces=[];}flush(){this._state='IDLE';this._landedIndex=-1;this._landedFace='';this._win=0;this._betAmount=0;this._betFace='';this._faces=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._state=wrapper.readString()||'IDLE';this._landedIndex=wrapper.readInt();this._landedFace=wrapper.readString();this._win=wrapper.readInt();this._betAmount=wrapper.readInt();this._betFace=wrapper.readString();const n=wrapper.readInt();this._faces=[];for(let i=0;i<n;i++)this._faces.push(wrapper.readString());return true;}get state(){return this._state;}get landedIndex(){return this._landedIndex;}get landedFace(){return this._landedFace;}get win(){return this._win;}get betAmount(){return this._betAmount;}get betFace(){return this._betFace;}get faces(){return this._faces;}}
